title: Structural Market Shifts, Not Just Barrels, Powering the Dirty Rally
section_path: Structural Market Shifts, Not Just Barrels, Powering the Dirty Rally
section_path_text: Structural Market Shifts, Not Just Barrels, Powering the Dirty Rally
summary:
Main
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-11-07 144030.png | assets/2025-11-07_structural-market-shifts-not-just-barrels-powering-the-dirty-rally_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_7c8add5a003a.png
Crude freight markets are experiencing a surge, which available data suggests is not solely attributable to extended voyages or an oversupply of crude. Elevated tonne-days versus lower tonne-miles reveal a market constrained by structural inefficiencies, including vessel rerouting, compliance delays, and sanction-related reshuffling, which have tightened fleet availability across the dirty segment. Freight Rates Surge as Inefficiencies Mount
Image reference: unnamed.png | assets/2025-11-07_structural-market-shifts-not-just-barrels-powering-the-dirty-rally_img_unnamed_2a813c61a397.png
Crude freight markets are experiencing another surge, with spot rates for VLCC, Suezmax, and Aframax segments reaching multi-month highs exceeding WS100.

children.summary:
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-11-07 144030.png | assets/2025-11-07_structural-market-shifts-not-just-barrels-powering-the-dirty-rally_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_7c8add5a003a.png
Crude freight markets are experiencing a surge, which available data suggests is not solely attributable to extended voyages or an oversupply of crude. Elevated tonne-days versus lower tonne-miles reveal a market constrained by structural inefficiencies, including vessel rerouting, compliance delays, and sanction-related reshuffling, which have tightened fleet availability across the dirty segment.

children.title: Freight Rates Surge as Inefficiencies Mount
section_path: Freight Rates Surge as Inefficiencies Mount
children.section_path_text: Freight Rates Surge as Inefficiencies Mount
children.summary:
Image reference: unnamed.png | assets/2025-11-07_structural-market-shifts-not-just-barrels-powering-the-dirty-rally_img_unnamed_2a813c61a397.png
Crude freight markets are experiencing another surge, with spot rates for VLCC, Suezmax, and Aframax segments reaching multi-month highs exceeding WS100. Crude freight markets are experiencing another surge, with spot rates for VLCC AG-China, Suezmax WAFR-Continent, and Aframax Mediterranean routes all climbing to multi-month highs.

children.title: The Hidden Driver: Tonne-Days Remain Elevated
section_path: The Hidden Driver: Tonne-Days Remain Elevated
children.section_path_text: The Hidden Driver: Tonne-Days Remain Elevated
children.summary: Tonne-days have risen to about 250 million by Q4, hitting multi-year peaks from the lows of below 220 million in early 2025. This indicates not shorter trade distances, but slower fleet circulation and increasing inefficiencies.
